name: Protoball
short_description: Protoball is a futuristic Arena Sports Shooter, a blend of basketball and soccer crossed with high tech futuristic style. Players athletically jump, slide, run, grind and dash around the arena trying to pass the Protoball through the opponents goal. This is the game you've been waiting for.
detailed_description:
PROTOBALL IS LIVE AND FREE ON STEAM RIGHT NOW!

Protoball is the combination of an Arena Shooter, Movement Shooter, and Futuristic Sports Game. The futuristic sports shooter where you run, slide, grind, dash, curve shots like a pro, and snipe opponents with energy shields is finally here and ready to play.

Protoball is an indie eSport with a growing community. This community organizes games and scrims in the Protoball discord.
about_the_game:
PROTOBALL IS LIVE AND FREE ON STEAM RIGHT NOW!

Protoball is the combination of an Arena Shooter, Movement Shooter, and Futuristic Sports Game. The futuristic sports shooter where you run, slide, grind, dash, curve shots like a pro, and snipe opponents with energy shields is finally here and ready to play.

Protoball is an indie eSport with a growing community. This community organizes games and scrims in the Protoball discord.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Vietnamese, Hindi
*languages with full audio support

reviews.review_text: Great game, great community. Join the discord to find someone to play with.
one of the best games ive played and the devs are great at listening to the players about issues

Absolute Gold. This game is amazing, and it's on Linux too! The game is just getting started up it seems, but it has SO MUCH potential. This is the kind of game that has staying power in your regular rotation of games played. It's basically like they say, Arena Shooter (like Quake) meets Rocket League (or Basketball in outerspace with sci-fi ninja movement). It's really a movement shooter, arena shooter, and sports shooter.

It's going to be so cool to see the pro scene develop, and I hope with Steam Cube that scene grows on Linux too. This game will definitely help Linux Gaming grow. 

Players shoot the ball, and an energy shield, around an arena trying to win the game. The amount of clever things I've seen other people do is wild, like self-passing using the shield to knock the ball back to yourself. There are also fun training modes you can grind when there aren't opponents playing, they're hard but fun and help build on your skills. 

Join the discord and find matches, it's actually cool. Very happy I found Protoball.

game is so dope

-more updates!!! Yo the devs are amazing! They've been listening to the players and updating the game like every other day. THE GAME IS ALIVE AND WELL! 

-Update - THE GAME IS BACK! Everyone is so happy and so am I. In the discord people are going nuts over the return and I'd urge you to join the discord and get in some games with everyone! Super cool community, and the game is absolutely amazing. 

I'm so happy this game is back, there's not another game like this out there and I can't wait for the tourneys!
This is an exceptional multiplayer game! It's so much fun to play with the boys on Discord, and its getting better all the time thanks to the hard work of the indie devs.
